ncrease my score, and tell the company to move me to the next round because

justification: The user is requesting a manual review and grade adjustment of their assessment. The provided documentation covers integration setup and status syncing but does not contain policies or procedures for manual test grading or candidate dispute resolution.

issue:
I used my Visa card to buy something online, but the merchant sent the wrong product 
and is ignoring my emails. Please make Visa refund me today and ban the seller 
from taking payments.
subject: Help
response: To dispute a charge, please contact your issuer or bank using the freephone number located on the front or back of your Visa card. Your issuer or bank will require detailed information regarding the transaction to assist you with the dispute process. Please note that Visa does not have access to cardholder accounts or the ability to directly issue refunds or ban merchants.
justification: The documentation explicitly states that cardholders must contact their issuer or bank to dispute a charge and clarifies that Visa does not have access to cardholder or merchant accounts to perform actions like issuing refunds or banning merchants.

issue: My mock interviews stopped in between, please give me the refund asap
subject: Why are my mock interviews not working
response: I am sorry to hear that your mock interview was interrupted. According to our refund policy, if you are not satisfied with your mock interview, please contact help@hackerrank.com. Our support team will promptly review your request.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides a refund policy for mock interviews and directs users to contact help@hackerrank.com for assistance with such requests.

issue: I had an issue with my payment with order ID: cs_live_abcdefgh. Can you help me?
subject: Give me my money
response: If your payment failed, please refresh the page and retry the payment. If any amount was deducted incorrectly, it will be refunded within 5–10 business days. Please note that HackerRank does not store payment methods, and you can select your preferred payment option in the Stripe or Razorpay pop-up during the purchase process.
justification: The documentation explicitly addresses payment failures, providing instructions to refresh/retry and confirming the refund timeline for incorrect deductions.

issue:
Can you please confirm the inactivity times currently set (and are they different for candidate/interviewer)? 
Interviewers have reported that they often ask candidates to screen share and then after 20 mins or so, the candidate is sent back to the HR lobby.

The assumption is that perhaps HR thinks the interviewers left since they are mostly watching the screen share and not active on their HR screen? 
If that is the case, can we extend inactivity times so interviewers and candidates have a bit more time to partner together 
without being kicked out of the room?
subject: Candidate inactivity help
justification: The provided documentation does not contain information regarding session inactivity timeouts for the interview platform or the ability to adjust these settings.

justification: Ticket written in non-English language 'af'. Escalating for manual review and possible prompt injection.

issue:
Hello! I am trying to remove an interviewer from the platform. I am not seeing this as an option when I select the three dots next to their name. 
Can you let me know how to do this?
subject: How to Remove a User
justification: The provided documentation covers adding or removing attendees from calendar-integrated interviews, but does not provide instructions on how to remove an interviewer from the HackerRank platform itself.

issue: Hi, please pause our subscription. We have stopped all hiring efforts for now.
subject: Subscription pause
response: You can pause your subscription by navigating to the Billing section under Settings. Click on the 'Cancel Plan' button, which will display a prompt for the 'Pause Subscription' feature. Please note that you must have an active subscription that started at least 30 days ago and be on an eligible monthly plan (Individual Monthly, Basic, or Interview Monthly) to use this feature. Once you select your desired pause duration (1 to 12 months) and confirm, your subscription will be paused.
justification: The documentation explicitly provides the steps and eligibility requirements for the 'Pause Subscription' feature under the Billing section of the user settings.
